title: Audit Rust/Zephyr/Python implementation parity
description: THREE co-equal implementations: Rust, Zephyr (C), Python. Python also runs simulator (test oracle). When any disagree, SPEC decides. Need: (1) Feature matrix across all 3, (2) Shared test vectors all must pass (gbuw), (3) Python sim as interop test harness.
close_reason: Audit complete: Filed 7 sub-beads for implementation gaps. Key findings: (1) Zephyr SCHC lacks fragmentation/reassembly [bcds], (2) Rust SCHC missing headers/context [qopb], (3) Zephyr missing ICMPv6 [u54o], (4) Python CoAP block transfer needs verification [k1p9], (5) Zephyr needs CoAP server [o6pb], (6) DTN only in Zephyr [2bga], (7) Rust RPL DAO less complete [r6r8], (8) Rust OSCORE needs RFC 8613 AAD [2okc]. Core features (link layer, OSCORE, EDHOC, announce/gradient, LOADng) have good parity across all three implementations.
